# AccessoryNotificationManaging

**Protocol**

A protocol that enables the communication of notification responses to the system.

## Declaration

```swift
protocol AccessoryNotificationManaging
```

## Overview

The [doc://com.apple.accessorynotifications/documentation/AccessoryNotifications/AccessoryNotificationManagerFactory] class provides access to a system-provided object that implements this protocol through [doc://com.apple.accessorynotifications/documentation/AccessoryNotifications/AccessoryNotificationManagerFactory/defaultManager].



## Clearing notifications

- **removeNotifications(forIdentifiers:sourceIdentifier:for:)**: Removes notifications posted by an application.

## Sending notification responses

- **sendResponse(_:for:)**: Sends a notification response from an accessory to the system.

## Interactive support

- **AccessoryNotificationManagerFactory**: A factory class that provides access to the system notification manager.
- **NotificationResponse**: A person’s response to a notification.
